faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Jamaica, Queens?
faqs.answer: Jamaica residents most frequently encounter pavement ants, odorous house ants, carpenter ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wooden structures common in older Jamaica homes. Our technicians identify the specific species to apply the most effective treatment.
